acceptance_criteria.text: Recovery plan identifies terminal failed refresh jobs that can be retried manually and/or released.
proof: build_refresh_recovery_plan uses refresh result, reliability, and billing state to mark retry_allowed and release_allowed.
Recovery service only returns retry_allowed; it never enqueues a retry job.

acceptance_criteria.text: Reservation release requires explicit confirmation and existing finalization boundary.
proof: release_failed_refresh_reservation blocks without confirm_release and calls finalize_reserved_action_credits(..., finalization_mode='release') when confirmed.

known_gaps: Recovery boundary is not connected to cron/job/runtime endpoint in this sprint.
